subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Husayn! Blessed be thy turning, blessed be thine advent. Happy art thou for what thou hast drunk [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین مبارک باشد اقبال شما مبارک باشد ورود شما هنیئا لک بما شربت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
